heading: Types of Technical Debt
rows: Deliberate shortcuts
Skipping input validation to hit a launch date
Security vulnerabilities, data corruption
Add validation and write tests before next sprint
Outdated dependencies
Running React 16 when React 19 is stable
Missing security patches, incompatible ecosystem
Schedule quarterly dependency updates with npm audit
Copy-paste code
Same API fetch logic duplicated in 12 components
Bug fixes must be applied in 12 places
Extract into a shared hook or utility function
Missing tests
Zero test coverage on payment processing code
Every deploy is a gamble, regressions go unnoticed
Write tests for critical paths first, expand coverage over time
Poor naming
Variables named d, temp2, handleClick3
New developers cannot understand the code
Rename with descriptive names during code review
Hardcoded values
API URLs, color codes, and timeouts scattered in source
Changing one value requires searching the entire codebase
Extract to constants, config files, or environment variables
No documentation
Complex business logic with zero comments or READMEs
Only the original author understands the code
Document the why, not the what -- add comments and architecture docs
